UserDefElement.Comment: Error because Input out of range
Start FB immediately (default mode for Axis, not support for Axes Group)
Start FB after current motion has finished (defualt mode for Axes Group)
The current and the next motion FBs are blended, so the axes group will not stop between the motions (not support for single axis)
use the shortest way to reach the target position
move only in positive direction to reach the target position
move only in negative direction to reach the target position
when currently moving: continue to move into this direction; when currently not moving: use DIRECTION_SHORTEST_WAY

Node.name: PackTag
Node.Comment:
www.hevs.ch Institut Systemes Industriels Project: HEVS Pack 2022 Author: Cedric Lenoir Date: 2024 August 29
Base GVL for HEVS Pack Tag File name should be PackTag

Node.name: hevsPackAlarm_UI
Node.Comment:
Help for interface and diagnostic Goal is to test and learn Alarms and Warnings.
Can be used with program PRG_TestAlarm

Node.name: hevsPackTime
Node.Comment: HEVS Time, needed for Alarms and Time in Pack Computed with PRG_GetTime_CtrlX or PRG_GetTime_TwinCAT or Your own system

Node.name: hevsUI
Node.Comment:
Help for interface and diagnostic HEVS Pack could be used without this Struct.
Can be used with fbCmdBoolInterface Can be used with fbGetActualBoolState

Node.name: PRG_Unit
Node.Comment:
www.hevs.ch Institut Systemes Industriels Project: HEVS Pack 2022 Author: Cedric Lenoir Date: 2025 July 18
Summary: The main program of a S88 Unit May contain one ore more S88 EM or eventually CM
